sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking top red shape
before_lines = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after_lines = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')

print("=== CHANGED ROWS ===")
for i in range(64):
    if before_lines[i] != after_lines[i]:
        b = before_lines[i].replace('c', '.').replace('G', '.')
        a = after_lines[i].replace('c', '.').replace('G', '.')
        print(f"Row {i}:")
        print(f"  before: {b}")
        print(f"  after:  {a}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
